results.title: 3 Simple Dance Moves for Beginners (Hip Hop Dance Moves Tutorial) | Mihran Kirakosian
results.reason: Mihran Kirakosian is a top-tier educator; comments consistently praise his ability to break down complex hip hop grooves into manageable parts.
summary: Learn three easy hip hop steps
Master basic rhythm and body bounce
Practice moving your feet with confidence
Follow simple instructions for every move

results.title: Easy Dance Routine - (Hip Hop Dance Tutorial AGES 7+)  | MihranTV
results.reason: The longer duration allows for a real class-like progression, ensuring beginners actually retain the routine through repetition.
summary: Follow a full beginner dance routine
Learn how to link moves together
Practice dancing to a steady beat
Build confidence with simple hip hop

results.title: Dance Tutorial for 3 to 7 years Kids | 5 Basic Steps | Deepak Tulsyan | G M Dance | Part 4 #withme
results.reason: Highly effective for the specific 3-7 age demographic with simple, repetitive movements, though depth is limited for adult learners.
summary: Learn five basic steps for kids
Practice coordination with fun movements
Follow slow and clear foot patterns
Build a foundation for young dancers

results.title: How To Dance At Events In Your 40s and 50s and Not Be EMBARRASSING
results.reason: Addresses the psychological barrier of dancing in public for older beginners with very clear, low-stakes instructions.
summary: Learn natural moves for social events
Avoid looking stiff on the floor
Master simple grooves for any song
Feel comfortable dancing at any party

results.title: 3 Basic Dance Steps for Beginners - Easy Dance Steps | Deepak Tulsyan Dance Tutorial
results.reason: Focuses on universal basic steps that are applicable across genres, making it a solid foundation for any beginner.
summary: Master three foundational dance steps
Learn to move your arms naturally
Practice simple weight shifts and timing
Start dancing with very easy patterns
